ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., Splash Bash, Pool Party) */,
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age range for participants */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is held */,
  "fee_structure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee structure for the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the event was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the event */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_fee_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_structure_id") REFERENCES fee_structures ("fee_structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_age_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_range_id") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_structures" (
  "fee_structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee structure */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., Daily Visit, Membership, Fixed) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount, if applicable */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code, if applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrants" (
  "registrant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registrant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the registrant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the registrant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the registrant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the registrant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the registrant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the registrant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the registrant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the registrant was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the registrant */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the registrant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registrant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "registrant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registrant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used, if applicable */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the registration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the registration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_registrant_id FOREIGN KEY ("registrant_id") REFERENCES registrants ("registrant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Organizer, Assistant) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the staff member is assigned to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the staff member */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the staff member */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the event type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the event type was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the event type */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "age_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the age range (e.g., All, 6+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the age range */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the age range was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the age range */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the age range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Attended, Did Not Attend) */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the participant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the participant */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the review */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the photo */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the photo */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_photos_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the schedule entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the schedule entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the schedule entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the schedule entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the setting was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the setting */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Text of the reminder message */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the reminder */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the reminder */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
